verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዐረባ ፡ ለሞአብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘኢያሪኮ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel departed, and encamped on the west of Moab by Jordan toward Jericho.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel set forward, and pitched in the plains of Moab on this side Jordan by Jericho.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ባለቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴፎር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በአሞሬዎን ፤

translations.lxx: And when Balac son of Sepphor saw all that Israel did to the Amorite,
translations.kjv: And Balak the son of Zippor saw all that Israel had done to the Amorites.

verses.geez:
ወፈርህዎሙ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ እስመ ፡ ብዙኃን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወተሀወኩ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ
                  ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: then Moab feared the people exceedingly because they were many; and Moab was grieved before the face of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And Moab was sore afraid of the people, because they were many: and Moab was distressed because of the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ለአእሩገ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ታኀልቆሙ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ አውድነ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ያኀልቅ ፡ ላህም ፡ ሣዕረ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወባለቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴፎር ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Moab said to the elders of Madiam, Now shall this assembly lick up all that are round about us, as a calf would lick up the green herbs of the field:—and Balac son of Sepphor was king of Moab at that time.
translations.kjv: And Moab said unto the elders of Midian, Now shall this company lick up all that are round about us, as the ox licketh up the grass of the field. And Balak the son of Zippor was king of the Moabites at that time.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ተናብልተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ወልደ ፡ ቤዖር ፡ ዘፋቱራ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡
                  ሕዝቡ ፡ ወጸውዖ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ ናሁአ ፡ ሕዝብአ ፡ ዘወጽአ ፡ እምነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ከደና ፡ ለገጸ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  ወሀለዉ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ቅሩብየ ።

translations.lxx: And he sent ambassadors to Balaam the son of Beor, to Phathura, which is on a river of the land of the sons of his people, to call him, saying, Behold, a people is come out of Egypt, and behold it has covered the face of the earth, and it has encamped close to me.
translations.kjv: He sent messengers therefore unto Balaam the son of Beor to Pethor, which is by the river of the land of the children of his people, to call him, saying, Behold, there is a people come out from Egypt: behold, they cover the face of the earth, and they abide over against me:

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ነዐ ፡ ርግሞሙ ፡ ሊተ ፡ እስመ ፡ ይጸንዑ ፡ እምኔነ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ንክል ፡ ቀቲሎቶሙ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ወናውፅኦሙ
                  ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድር ፡ እስመ ፡ ኣአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘአንተ ፡ ባረከ ፡ ቡሩከ ፡ ይከውን ፡ ወዘአንተ ፡ ረገምከ ፡ ርጉመአ ፡
                  ይከውንአ ።

translations.lxx: And now come, curse me this people, for it is stronger than we; if we may be able to smite some of them, and I will cast them out of the land: for I know that whomsoever thou dost bless, they are blessed, and whomsoever thou dost curse, they are cursed.
translations.kjv: Come now therefore, I pray thee, curse me this people; for they are too mighty for me: peradventure I shall prevail, that we may smite them, and that I may drive them out of the land: for I wot that he whom thou blessest is blessed, and he whom thou cursest is cursed.

verses.geez:
ወሖሩ ፡ አዕሩገ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ወአዕሩገ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ መቃስምቲሆሙ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ በለዓም ፡
                  ወነገርዎ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ባለቅ ።

translations.lxx: And the elders of Moab went, and the elders of Madiam, and their divining instruments were in their hands; and they came to Balaam, and spoke to him the words of Balac.
translations.kjv: And the elders of Moab and the elders of Midian departed with the rewards of divination in their hand; and they came unto Balaam, and spake unto him the words of Balak.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ቢቱ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወኣየድዐክሙ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ዘይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ሞአብ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ በለዓም ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, Tarry here the night, and I will answer you the things which the Lord shall say to me; and the princes of Moab stayed with Balaam.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Lodge here this night, and I will bring you word again, as the LORD shall speak unto me: and the princes of Moab abode with Balaam.

verses.geez: ወመጽአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኀበ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ምንተ ፡ መጽኡ ፡ እሉ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ኀቤከ ።

translations.lxx: And God came to Balaam, and said to him, Who are these men with thee?
translations.kjv: And God came unto Balaam, and said, What men are these with thee?

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በላቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴፎር ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ፈነዎሙ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፤

translations.lxx: And Balaam said to God, Balac son of Sepphor, king of Moab, sent them to me, saying,
translations.kjv: And Balaam said unto God, Balak the son of Zippor, king of Moab, hath sent unto me, saying,

verses.geez:
ናሁአ ፡ ሕዝብአ ፡ ዘወፅአ ፡ እምነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወከደና ፡ ለገጸ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወሀለዉ ፡ ንቡራነ ፡ ቅሩብየ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡
                  ነዐ ፡ ርግሞሙ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለእመ ፡ እክል ፡ ቀቲሎቶሙ ፡ ወአወፅኦሙ ፡ እምነአ ፡ ምድርአ ።

translations.lxx: Behold, a people has come forth out of Egypt, and has covered the face of the land, and it has encamped near to me; and now come, curse it for me, if indeed I shall be able to smite it, and cast it out of the land.
translations.kjv: Behold, there is a people come out of Egypt, which covereth the face of the earth: come now, curse me them; peradventure I shall be able to overcome them, and drive them out.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ኢትሑር ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወኢትርግም ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ እስመ ፡ ቡሩክ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And God said to Balaam, Thou shalt not go with them, neither shalt thou curse the people; for they are blessed.
translations.kjv: And God said unto Balaam, Thou shalt not go with them; thou shalt not curse the people: for they are blessed.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ በለዓም ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለመላእክተ ፡ በላቅ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግቢእክሙ ፡ ግብኡ ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ኢኀደገኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ እሑር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam rose up in the morning, and said to the princes of Balac, Depart quickly to your lord; God does not permit me to go with you.
translations.kjv: And Balaam rose up in the morning, and said unto the princes of Balak, Get you into your land: for the LORD refuseth to give me leave to go with you.

verses.geez: ወተንሥኡ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ባለቅ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ አበየ ፡ በለዓም ፡ መጺአ ፡ ምስሌነ ።

translations.lxx: And the princes of Moab rose, and came to Balac, and said, Balaam will not come with us.
translations.kjv: And the princes of Moab rose up, and they went unto Balak, and said, Balaam refuseth to come with us.

verses.geez: ወደገመ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ባላቅ ፡ ፈነወ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ እለ ፡ ይበዝኁ ፡ ወእለ ፡ ይከብሩ ፡ እምእልክቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Balac yet again sent more princes and more honourable than they.
translations.kjv: And Balak sent yet again princes, more, and more honourable than they.

verses.geez:
ወመጽኡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ባላቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴፎር ፡ ብቍዐኒአ ፡ ኢትትሀከይአ ፡ መጺኦተአ
                  ፡ ኀቤየ ።

translations.lxx: And they came to Balaam, and they say to him, Thus says Balac the son of Sepphor: I beseech thee, delay not to come to me.
translations.kjv: And they came to Balaam, and said to him, Thus saith Balak the son of Zippor, Let nothing, I pray thee, hinder thee from coming unto me:

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ አክብሮ ፡ ኣከብረከ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘትቤለኒ ፡ እገብር ፡ ለከ ፡ ወነዐ ፡ ርግሞሙ ፡ ሊተአ ፡ ለዝንቱአ ፡ ሕዝብአ
                  ።

translations.lxx: For I will greatly honour thee, and will do for thee whatsoever thou shalt say; come then, curse me this people.
translations.kjv: For I will promote thee unto very great honour, and I will do whatsoever thou sayest unto me: come therefore, I pray thee, curse me this people.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥኦሙ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለመላእክተ ፡ በላቅ ፡ ምልአ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ወብሩረ ፡ እመ ፡ ወሀበኒ ፡ በላቅ
                  ፡ ኢይክል ፡ ተዓውሮ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ እግበር ፡ ንኡሰ ፡ አው ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ እምልብየ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam answered and said to the princes of Balac, If Balac would give me his house full of silver and gold, I shall not be able to go beyond the word of the Lord God, to make it little or great in my mind.
translations.kjv: And Balaam answered and said unto the servants of Balak, If Balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, I cannot go beyond the word of the LORD my God, to do less or more.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ቢቱ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ይገብር ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ይብለኒ ።

translations.lxx: And now do ye also tarry here this night, and I shall know what the Lord will yet say to me.
translations.kjv: Now therefore, I pray you, tarry ye also here this night, that I may know what the LORD will say unto me more.

verses.geez:
ወመጽአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኀበ ፡ በለዓም ፡ በሌሊት ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ እመ ፡ ይጸውዑከኑ ፡ መጽኡ ፡ እሉ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ተንሥእ
                  ፡ ወትልዎሙ ፡ አላ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ዘእቤለከ ፡ ኪያሁ ፡ ግበር ።

translations.lxx: And God came to Balaam by night, and said to him, If these men are come to call thee, rise and follow them; nevertheless the word which I shall speak to thee, it shalt thou do.
translations.kjv: And God came unto Balaam at night, and said unto him, If the men come to call thee, rise up, and go with them; but yet the word which I shall say unto thee, that shalt thou do.

verses.geez: ወተንሥአ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ወረሐነ ፡ አድግቶ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ምስለ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ በላቅ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam rose up in the morning, and saddled his ass, and went with the princes of Moab.
translations.kjv: And Balaam rose up in the morning, and saddled his ass, and went with the princes of Moab.

verses.geez:
ወተምዕዐ ፡ መዐተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ሖረ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወተንሥአ ፡ መልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይትዓቀፎ ፡ ወውእቱሰ
                  ፡ ይጼዐን ፡ ዲበ ፡ አድግቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ደቁ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And God was very angry because he went; and the angel of the Lord rose up to withstand him. Now he had mounted his ass, and his two servants were with him.
translations.kjv: And God’s anger was kindled because he went: and the angel of the LORD stood in the way for an adversary against him. Now he was riding upon his ass, and his two servants were with him.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየቶ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡ ለመልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይቀውም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ወሰይፍ ፡ ምሉኅ ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ተግሕሠት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡ እምነ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ወሖረት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወዘበጣ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡
                  በበትር ፡ ከመ ፡ ይግብኣ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት ።

translations.lxx: And when the ass saw the angel of God standing opposite in the way, and his sword drawn in his hand, then the ass turned aside out of the way, and went into the field; and Balaam smote the ass with his staff to direct her in the way.
translations.kjv: And the ass saw the angel of the LORD standing in the way, and his sword drawn in his hand: and the ass turned aside out of the way, and went into the field: and Balaam smote the ass, to turn her into the way.

verses.geez: ወቆመ ፡ መልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ፀቈን ፡ ዘዓጸደ ፡ ወይን ፡ ፀቈን ፡ እምለፌ ፡ ወፀቈን ፡ እምለፌ ።

translations.lxx: And the angel of the Lord stood in the avenues of the vines, a fence being on this side and a fence on that.
translations.kjv: But the angel of the LORD stood in a path of the vineyards, a wall being on this side, and a wall on that side.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየቶ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡ ለመልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ተጠውቀት ፡ በፀቈን ፡ ወመለጠቶ ፡ እግሮ ፡ ለበለዓም
                  ፡ ወደገመ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ዘቢጦታ ።

translations.lxx: And when the ass saw the angel of God, she thrust herself against the wall, and crushed Balaam's foot against the wall, and he smote her again.
translations.kjv: And when the ass saw the angel of the LORD, she thrust herself unto the wall, and crushed Balaam’s foot against the wall: and he smote her again.

verses.geez:
ወደገመ ፡ መልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ወቆመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ጸቢብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ምግሐሠ ፡ ኢለየማን ፡
                  ወኢለፀጋም ።

translations.lxx: And the angel of the Lord went farther, and came and stood in a narrow place where it was impossible to turn to the right or the left.
translations.kjv: And the angel of the LORD went further, and stood in a narrow place, where was no way to turn either to the right hand or to the left.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየቶ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አድግት ፡ ለመልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በረከት ፡ በታሕቴሁ ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ወዘበጣ ፡ በበትር
                  ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ አድግት ።

translations.lxx: And when the ass saw the angel of God, she lay down under Balaam; and Balaam was angry, and struck the ass with his staff.
translations.kjv: And when the ass saw the angel of the LORD, she fell down under Balaam: and Balaam’s anger was kindled, and he smote the ass with a staff.

verses.geez:
ወፈትሐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አፉሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ምንተ ፡ ረሰይኩከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትዝብጠኒ ፡
                  ናሁ ፡ ሣልስከ ፡ ዝንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And God opened the mouth of the ass, and she says to Balaam, What have I done to thee, that thou hast smitten me this third time?
translations.kjv: And the LORD opened the mouth of the ass, and she said unto Balaam, What have I done unto thee, that thou hast smitten me these three times?

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡ እስመ ፡ ተሳለቂ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ብየ ፡ መጥባኅተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴየ ፡
                  ወዳእኩ ፡ እምረገዝኩኪ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam said to the ass, Because thou hast mocked me; and if I had had a sword in my hand, I would now have killed thee.
translations.kjv: And Balaam said unto the ass, Because thou hast mocked me: I would there were a sword in mine hand, for now would I kill thee.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አድግት ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ አኮኑ ፡ አነ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ኦድግትከ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትፄዐን ፡ እምንእስከ ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ ዮም ፡ ወዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቦኑ ፡ አመ ፡ ተዐውሮ ፡ ተዐወርኩከ ፡ ወገበርኩ ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ አልቦ ።

translations.lxx: And the ass says to Balaam, Am not I thine ass on which thou hast ridden since thy youth till this day? did I ever do thus to thee, utterly disregarding thee? and he said, No.
translations.kjv: And the ass said unto Balaam, Am not I thine ass, upon which thou hast ridden ever since I was thine unto this day? was I ever wont to do so unto thee? And he said, Nay.

verses.geez:
ወከሠተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አዕይንቲሁ ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ወርእዮ ፡ ለመልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይቀውም ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ፍኖት ፡ ወመጥባኅት ፡ ምልኅት ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወደነነ ፡ ወሰገደ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ በገጹ ።

translations.lxx: And God opened the eyes of Balaam, and he sees the angel of the Lord withstanding him in the way, and his sword drawn in his hand, and he stooped down and worshipped on his face.
translations.kjv: Then the LORD opened the eyes of Balaam, and he saw the angel of the LORD standing in the way, and his sword drawn in his hand: and he bowed down his head, and fell flat on his face.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ መልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለምንት ፡ ዘበጥካሃ ፡ ለአድግትከ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ሣልስከ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ አነ ፡
                  ወፃእኩ ፡ ከመ ፡ እትዓቀፍከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢኮነት ፡ ርትዕተ ፡ ፍኖትከ ፡ ቅድሜየ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ርእየተኒ ፡ አድግትከ ፡ ተግሕሠት
                  ፡ እምኔየ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሣልስ ፡ ዝንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the angel of God said to him, Why hast thou smitten thine ass this third time? and, behold, I came out to withstand thee, for thy way was not seemly before me; and when the ass saw me, she turned away from me this third time.
translations.kjv: And the angel of the LORD said unto him, Wherefore hast thou smitten thine ass these three times? behold, I went out to withstand thee, because thy way is perverse before me:

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ አኮ ፡ ዘተግሕሠት ፡ እምኔየ ፡ እምወዳእኩ ፡ ቀተልኩከ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ወኪያሃሰ ፡ እምአሕየውክዋ ።

translations.lxx: And if she had not turned out of the way, surely now, I should have slain thee, and should have saved her alive.
translations.kjv: And the ass saw me, and turned from me these three times: unless she had turned from me, surely now also I had slain thee, and saved her alive.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ለመልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አበስኩ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢያእመርኩ ፡ ከመ ፡ አንተ ፡ ተቃወምከኒ ፡ ቅድሜየ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢትፈቅድ ፡ እግባእ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam said to the angel of the Lord, I have sinned, for I did not know that thou wert standing opposite in the way to meet me; and now if it shall not be pleasing to thee for me to go on, I will return.
translations.kjv: And Balaam said unto the angel of the LORD, I have sinned; for I knew not that thou stoodest in the way against me: now therefore, if it displease thee, I will get me back again.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ መልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ሑር ፡ ምስለ ፡ እሉ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወባሕቱ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ዘእቤለከ ፡ ኪያሁ ፡
                  ተዐቀብ ፡ ለነቢብ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ምስለ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ በላቅ ።

translations.lxx: And the angel of the Lord said to Balaam, Go with the men: nevertheless the word which I shall speak to thee, that thou shalt take heed to speak. And Balaam went with the princes of Balac.
translations.kjv: And the angel of the LORD said unto Balaam, Go with the men: but only the word that I shall speak unto thee, that thou shalt speak. So Balaam went with the princes of Balak.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ በላቅ ፡ ከመ ፡ መጽአ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ወፅአ ፡ ተቀበሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ እንተ ፡ ደወለ ፡
                  አርኖን ፡ እንተ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኅብር ፡ እምደወሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And when Balac heard that Balaam was come, he went out to meet him, to a city of Moab, which is on the borders of Arnon, which is on the extreme part of the borders.
translations.kjv: And when Balak heard that Balaam was come, he went out to meet him unto a city of Moab, which is in the border of Arnon, which is in the utmost coast.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ባላቅ ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ አኮኑ ፡ ለአኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ ይጸውዑከ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ኢመጻእከ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ እምኢክህልኩኑ ፡
                  አክብሮ[ተ]ከ ።

translations.lxx: And Balac said to Balaam, Did I not send to thee to call thee? why hast thou not come to me? shall I not indeed be able to honour thee?
translations.kjv: And Balak said unto Balaam, Did I not earnestly send unto thee to call thee? wherefore camest thou not unto me? am I not able indeed to promote thee to honour?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ለባላቅ ፡ ናሁ ፡ መጻእኩ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ይእዜኒ ፡ እክል ፡ ነቢበ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ዘወደየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ኦፉየ ፡ ወኪያሁ ፡ እትዓቀብ ፡ ለነቢብ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam said to Balac, Behold, I am now come to thee: shall I be able to say anything? the word which God shall put into my mouth, that I shall speak.
translations.kjv: And Balaam said unto Balak, Lo, I am come unto thee: have I now any power at all to say any thing? the word that God putteth in my mouth, that shall I speak.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ በለዓም ፡ ምስለ ፡ ባላቅ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ንድቅ ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam went with Balac, and they came to the cities of streets.
translations.kjv: And Balaam went with Balak, and they came unto Kirjathhuzoth.

verses.geez: ወጠብኀ ፡ ባላቅ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ወአልህምተ ፡ ወፈነወ ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ወለመላእክት ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Balac offered sheep and calves, and sent to Balaam and to his princes who were with him.
translations.kjv: And Balak offered oxen and sheep, and sent to Balaam, and to the princes that were with him.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ጸብሐ ፡ ነሥኦ ፡ ባላቅ ፡ ለበለዓም ፡ ወአዕረጎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትእምርቱ ፡ ለበአል ፡ ወአርአዮ ፡ እምህየ
                  ፡ አሐደ ፡ ኅብረ ፡ እምሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And it was morning; and Balac took Balaam, and brought him up to the pillar of Baal, and shewed him thence a part of the people.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass on the morrow, that Balak took Balaam, and brought him up into the high places of Baal, that thence he might see the utmost part of the people.
